task.description: Create ProfileController and setup module structure

subtasks.subtask: Transform response to UserResDto using plainToInstance
Return success response with user data
Check phoneNumber change → require OTP verification (use OtpService from Story 2.8)
Return success response with updated user data
Implement findOne(id: string, domainID: string): Promise<User>
Add domainID filtering and deletedAt: null check
Implement updateProfile(userId: string, updateProfileDto: UpdateProfileDto): Promise<User>
Add phoneNumber uniqueness check before update
Add @Expose() decorated fields: id, phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, email, role, isActive, phoneVerified, createdAt, updatedAt
Exclude sensitive fields (passwordHash, domainID, deletedAt) by omitting them
Export UsersService for use by other modules
Test GET /users/me returns current user profile
Test PATCH /users/me updates firstName and lastName
Test PATCH /users/me validates input (400 for invalid data)
Test PATCH /users/me returns 409 for duplicate phoneNumber

task.description: Write integration tests for profile endpoints

subtasks.subtask: Test E2E: GET /users/me with valid JWT → returns UserResDto
Test E2E: GET /users/me without JWT → 401 Unauthorized
Test E2E: PATCH /users/me updates profile successfully
Test E2E: PATCH /users/me with duplicate phoneNumber → 409 Conflict
Test E2E: passwordHash never returned in response
Test E2E: phoneNumber change requires OTP verification

ac.summary: GET /users/me endpoint returns current user profile

details.detail: User authenticated with valid JWT token
Response contains UserResDto (id, phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, email, role, isActive, phoneVerified, timestamps)

ac.testStrategy: Unit tests for controller method, Integration test for full request cycle, E2E test for authentication flow

ac.summary: PATCH /users/me endpoint updates current user profile

details.detail: User can update firstName, lastName, phoneNumber
phoneNumber update requires OTP verification (Epic 2.7 integration)
Validation errors return 400 with detailed messages
phoneNumber uniqueness enforced (409 Conflict if duplicate)

ac.testStrategy: Unit tests with mocked service, Integration tests for validation and database constraints, E2E tests for OTP verification flow

doc.description: Complete technical specification for Epic 3 including Story 3.1 API specifications, data models, acceptance criteria, and system architecture alignment

keySection.section: APIs and Interfaces - GET /users/me and PATCH /users/me specifications
Data Models and Contracts - UserResDto and UpdateProfileDto
Test Strategy Summary - Unit and integration test approach

doc.description: Epic breakdown document containing high-level user stories and business requirements for all epics including Epic 3
Project architecture decisions including NestJS patterns, multi-tenancy approach, module organization, and response formatting standards

keySection.section: Decision Summary - Framework, authentication, permission system

doc.description: Previous story implementing OTP verification system that this story depends on for phoneNumber change validation

keySection.section: Dev Agent Record - Learnings about OTP service usage
OTP Service Integration - Purpose-based OTP types including phone-verification

doc.description: Database schema defining User entity with all fields including multi-tenancy (domainID) and soft-delete (deletedAt) support

keySection.section: User model - Fields: id, domainID, phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, email, role, isActive, phoneVerified, passwordHash, deletedAt

artifact.description: JWT Authentication Guard extending Passport AuthGuard('jwt') that validates JWT tokens and supports @Public() decorator bypass
artifact.usage: Apply to ProfileController methods using @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard) to protect routes requiring authentication

artifact.description: Parameter decorator to extract authenticated user (JwtPayload) from request after JWT validation
artifact.usage: Use @CurrentUser() user: JwtPayload in controller methods to access user.sub (userID), user.domainID, user.phoneNumber, user.roles

keyInterface.returns: JwtPayload { sub: string, phoneNumber: string, domainID: string, roles: string[], iat: number, exp: number }

artifact.description: TypeScript interface defining JWT token payload structure with user identification and multi-tenancy fields
artifact.usage: Import and use as type for @CurrentUser() decorator parameter

artifact.description: Global PrismaService extending PrismaClient for database operations with connection lifecycle management
artifact.usage: Inject PrismaService into UsersService for database queries: this.prisma.user.findUnique(), this.prisma.user.update()

keyInterface.extends: PrismaClient - All Prisma query methods available

artifact.description: OTP generation and validation service supporting multiple purposes including phone-verification
artifact.usage: Inject OtpService into ProfileController for phoneNumber change validation: await otpService.validateOtp(userId, otpCode, 'phone-verification')

keyInterface.method: validateOtp(userID: string, code: string, purpose: OtpPurpose): Promise<OtpValidationResult>

package.name: @nestjs/common
package.usage: Core NestJS decorators (@Controller, @Get, @Patch, @UseGuards, @Injectable), HTTP exceptions (UnauthorizedException, ConflictException)

package.name: @nestjs/jwt
package.usage: JWT token handling (used by auth module)

package.name: @prisma/client
package.usage: Database queries via PrismaService, User entity type

package.name: class-transformer
package.usage: DTO transformation (plainToInstance with excludeExtraneousValues: true, @Expose() decorator)

package.name: bcrypt
package.usage: Password hashing (not needed for this story but part of user service)

package.name: passport-jwt
package.usage: JWT strategy for Passport (used by JwtAuthGuard)

constraint.title: Controller-Service Pattern Mandatory
constraint.description: ProfileController handles HTTP layer (request/response transformation), UsersService handles business logic (validation, database operations). Clear separation of concerns following NestJS best practices.
constraint.enforcement: Controllers must not contain business logic or direct database queries. All database operations through service layer.

constraint.title: Multi-Tenancy DomainID Filtering Required
constraint.description: All user queries MUST include domainID filter extracted from JWT token via @CurrentUser() decorator. Prevents cross-domain data access.
constraint.enforcement: UsersService.findOne() and updateProfile() must filter by domainID. Test cross-domain access attempts return 403/404.

constraint.title: Standard Response Format via Interceptor
constraint.description: All responses wrapped by ResponseTransformInterceptor. Success: { success: true, data: UserResDto }. Error: { success: false, error: { code, message, details } }
constraint.enforcement: Controllers return plain objects/DTOs. Interceptor handles wrapping. No manual response wrapping in controllers.

constraint.title: DTO Transformation with Exclusion
constraint.description: Use class-transformer's plainToInstance with excludeExtraneousValues: true. @Expose() decorator on UserResDto fields ensures only intended fields returned. Automatically excludes passwordHash, domainID, deletedAt.
constraint.enforcement: UserResDto must use @Expose() on all returned fields. Transform using plainToInstance(UserResDto, user, { excludeExtraneousValues: true }).

constraint.title: JWT Authentication Required
constraint.description: JWT authentication via JwtAuthGuard from Epic 2. @CurrentUser() decorator extracts user from JWT payload. No additional permission checks needed for self-service endpoints.
constraint.enforcement: All ProfileController routes must use @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard). Extract user via @CurrentUser() decorator, not from request manually.

constraint.title: Soft-Delete Pattern Required
constraint.description: All user queries must filter deletedAt: null to exclude soft-deleted users. Users are never hard-deleted.
constraint.enforcement: UsersService.findOne() must include deletedAt: null in WHERE clause. Test that soft-deleted users return 404.

constraint.title: Phone Number Format and Uniqueness
constraint.description: phoneNumber validated with @IsPhoneNumber('TR') for Turkish format. Uniqueness enforced per domain in database (unique constraint on [domainID, phoneNumber]).
constraint.enforcement: UpdateProfileDto must use @IsPhoneNumber('TR'). UsersService.updateProfile() must check uniqueness before update, throw ConflictException(409) if duplicate.

constraint.title: OTP Verification for Phone Number Change
constraint.description: phoneNumber update requires OTP verification using OtpService from Story 2.8 with purpose='phone-verification'.
constraint.enforcement: PATCH /users/me must detect phoneNumber change, require OTP code in request, validate via OtpService.validateOtp() before allowing update.

constraint.title: 85% Unit Test Coverage Target
constraint.description: Mock PrismaService for database operations. Mock JwtAuthGuard for authentication. Test all success and error paths. Validate DTO transformations exclude sensitive fields.
constraint.enforcement: UsersService and ProfileController must have unit tests covering: success cases, 401 unauthorized, 400 validation, 404 not found, 409 conflict, passwordHash exclusion.

response.fields: id, phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, email, role, isActive, phoneVerified, createdAt, updatedAt

errors.error: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

body.field: Updated phone number - requires OTP verification

response.fields: Updated user object with same structure as GET /users/me

errors.error: Bad Request - Validation errors (invalid format, missing OTP for phoneNumber change)
Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token
Conflict - phoneNumber already exists in domain

method.name: findOne
method.description: Find single user by ID with domainID and soft-delete filtering
method.throws: NotFoundException if user not found or deleted

method.name: updateProfile
method.description: Update user profile with validation and uniqueness checks
method.throws: ConflictException if phoneNumber duplicate, BadRequestException if validation fails

standard.approach: Mock PrismaService for database operations. Mock JwtAuthGuard for authentication bypass. Test all success and error paths including DTO transformations.

keyScenarios.scenario: ProfileController.getProfile() returns UserResDto with passwordHash excluded
ProfileController.getProfile() throws 401 if user not authenticated
ProfileController.updateProfile() updates firstName and lastName successfully
ProfileController.updateProfile() validates input (400 for invalid data)
UsersService.findOne() filters by domainID and deletedAt: null

standard.approach: Use test database with transaction rollback. Test complete request/response cycle. Validate JWT authentication flow and DTO transformations.

keyScenarios.scenario: E2E: GET /users/me with valid JWT returns UserResDto without sensitive fields
E2E: GET /users/me without JWT returns 401 Unauthorized
E2E: PATCH /users/me updates profile successfully with valid data
E2E: PATCH /users/me with duplicate phoneNumber returns 409 Conflict
E2E: PATCH /users/me with phoneNumber change requires OTP verification
E2E: passwordHash never returned in any response

idea.title: Authenticated user can view own profile
idea.description: User with valid JWT token calls GET /users/me and receives complete profile with all non-sensitive fields

testSteps.step: Create test user in database
Generate valid JWT token for user
Call GET /users/me with Authorization header
Assert 200 OK response
Assert response contains UserResDto fields: id, phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, email, role, isActive, phoneVerified, timestamps
Assert response does NOT contain: passwordHash, domainID, deletedAt

idea.title: Unauthenticated request returns 401
idea.description: Request to GET /users/me without JWT token is rejected with 401 Unauthorized

testSteps.step: Call GET /users/me without Authorization header
Assert 401 Unauthorized response
Assert error message indicates missing/invalid token

idea.title: Profile update validates input fields
idea.description: PATCH /users/me with invalid data (e.g., firstName too short, invalid phoneNumber format) returns 400 with detailed validation errors

testSteps.step: Create test user and generate JWT
Call PATCH /users/me with invalid data: { firstName: 'A', phoneNumber: 'invalid' }
Assert 400 Bad Request response
Assert error details contain field-specific validation messages

idea.title: phoneNumber uniqueness enforced per domain
idea.description: Attempting to update phoneNumber to one already used by another user in same domain returns 409 Conflict

testSteps.step: Create two test users in same domain with different phoneNumbers
User1 attempts to update phoneNumber to User2's phoneNumber
Assert 409 Conflict response
Assert error message indicates phoneNumber already exists

idea.title: phoneNumber change requires OTP verification
idea.description: Updating phoneNumber requires OTP code validated via OtpService with purpose='phone-verification'

testSteps.step: Create test user and generate JWT
Call PATCH /users/me with new phoneNumber but no OTP code
Assert 400 Bad Request (OTP required)
Generate OTP via OtpService.generateOtp(userId, 'phone-verification')
Call PATCH /users/me with new phoneNumber and correct OTP code
Assert 200 OK response with updated phoneNumber

idea.title: passwordHash never in response
idea.description: Verify that passwordHash field is never returned in any profile endpoint response, even if user has a password

testSteps.step: Create admin user with password (passwordHash set in DB)
Call GET /users/me with admin JWT
Assert response does not contain 'passwordHash' field
Call PATCH /users/me to update profile
Assert response does not contain 'passwordHash' field

idea.title: Multi-tenancy domainID isolation
idea.description: User can only access/update their own profile within their domain. Cross-domain access blocked.

testSteps.step: Create user in Domain A
Generate JWT for user (contains domainID A)
UsersService.findOne() called with domainID from JWT
Assert query filters by domainID A
Manually test: User with Domain B JWT cannot access Domain A user's profile

idea.title: Soft-deleted user returns 404
idea.description: If user is soft-deleted (deletedAt not null), GET /users/me returns 404 Not Found

testSteps.step: Create test user
Soft-delete user (set deletedAt timestamp)
Generate JWT for deleted user
Call GET /users/me
Assert 404 Not Found (user not found due to deletedAt filter)
